description: Degenerate empty-JSON answer: after the loop seam recovers a leaked READ (search_assets) and feeds the result back, the model's next completion is literally '{}'. Provenance: 2026-06-10 post-fix deepseek-r1:8b conversational eval (machina-eval-postfix-deepseek-2026-06-10.md), 7 turns. Before the guard, nothing caught it: not tool-call-shaped (no name/function marker), not an empty string (the empty-response fallback did not fire), not a prior-turn echo -- the bare '{}' reached the user raw. Landed first as disposition 'clean' per R12; the _finalize_turn degenerate-JSON guard now substitutes the empty-response fallback (zero information, exactly like an empty completion), flipping this to 'fallback_empty'.
